wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} Periodically, {{ci|Rakan}} generates a {{tip|shield}} that regenerates out of combat if not broken.
wiki_detail.blurb2: '''Rakan's''' basic attacks and ability hits against enemy {{tip|champions}} {{sti|ah|reduce}} this ability's cooldown.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Innate - Lover's Leap:}} '''Rakan''' and {{ci|Xayah}} may {{si|recall|Recall}} together by {{tip|channel|channeling}} their ''Recalls'' beside each other.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} Periodically, '''Rakan''' grants himself a {{tip|shield}} for {{pp|30 to 225}} {{as|(+ 95% AP)}} that lasts until broken. After being [[out of combat]] for 5 seconds, any leftover shield will be restored to '''maximum''' value.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Rakan's''' [[basic attack]]s and [[champion ability|ability]] hits reduce ''Fey Feathers' '' {{sti|cooldown}} by 1 second for each enemy {{tip|champion}} hit.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Innate - Lover's Leap:}} If either '''Rakan''' or {{ci|Xayah}} is channeling {{si|Recall}}, the other may move nearby and channel their own to join alongside them. '''Both''' reach base at the time of which the initiator's {{si|Recall}} completes.
wiki_detail.knockdown:
|notes        = 
* {{ri|Revitalize}} will record bonus shielding when a new shield is created, but not when it regenerates. In either case, there is no bonus shielding received.
* The cooldown reduction is granted even if the ability is blocked by a {{tip|spell shield}}.

Q.name: Gleaming Quill
Q.description: Flings a magical feather that deals magic damage. Striking a champion or epic monster enables Rakan to heal his allies.
Q.tooltip:
Rakan flings a magical feather that deals {{ totaldamage }} magic damage to the first enemy hit.

If the feather hits a champion or epic jungle monster, Rakan restores {{ totalheal }} Health to himself and nearby allies after {{ healdelay }} seconds or when he touches an allied champion.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Rakan}} slings an enchanted feather in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If the feather hits an enemy {{tip|champion}} or epic {{tip|monster}}, '''Rakan''' winds up a circular mark around him over a few seconds. When the mark completes, Rakan {{tip|heal|heals}} himself.
wiki_detail.blurb3: If '''Rakan''' collides with an allied champion, the mark instantly completes to grant an increased heal to all champions within the circle.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rakan''' slings an enchanted feather in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit.
wiki_detail.description2: If the target was an enemy {{tip|champion}} or epic {{tip|monster}}, a radius is marked around '''Rakan'''. After 3 seconds or if an allied champion enters the radius, '''Rakan''' {{tip|heals}} himself and nearby allied champions for {{pp|40 to 210}} {{as|(+ 55% AP)}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The trigger radius is slightly smaller than the heal radius.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will not prevent the marked area from being formed.
* The heal can activate immediately after the projectile hits the target, before the healing return animation completes.
{{Effect at cast time end}}
* The heal will trigger and affect '''Rakan''' even if he is {{tip|untargetable}}.

W.name: Grand Entrance
W.description: Dashes to a location, knocking up nearby enemies on arrival.
W.tooltip: Rakan dashes, then spirals into the air, Knocking Up for {{ knockupduration }} second and dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb2: After a brief delay, he deals {{as|magic damage}} and briefly {{tip|airborne|knocks up}} nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rakan''' {{tip|dashes}} to the target location. After a {{fd|0.35}}-second delay upon arrival, he deals {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and {{tip|airborne|knocks them up}} for 1 second.
wiki_detail.description2: '''''Rakan''' will be {{tip|knockdown|knocked down}} by any {{tip|immobilize|immobilizing}} or {{tip|polymorph|polymorphing}} crowd control, excluding {{tip|sleep}}{{bug}}, during Grand Entrance.''
wiki_detail.description3: ''Grand Entrance will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''

E.name: Battle Dance
E.description: Flies to an allied champion granting them a shield. Can be re-cast for free for a short duration.
E.tooltip:
Rakan dashes to an allied champion, granting them {{ totalshield }} Shield for {{ e3 }} seconds.

Rakan can Recast this Ability once within {{ e2 }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{ci|Rakan}} can cast or re-cast ''Battle Dance'' at an increased {{sti|range}} when targeting {{ci|Xayah}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rakan''' {{tip|shield|shields}} the target allied champion for a short time, then {{tip|dash|dashes}} to them. ''Battle Dance'' can be recast once with no cost.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rakan''' grants a {{tip|shield}} to the target allied champion for 3 seconds and then {{tip|dash|dashes}} to and around them. ''Battle Dance'' can be recast within 5 seconds at no additional cost.
wiki_detail.description3: '''''Rakan''' will be {{tip|knockdown|knocked down}} by any {{tip|immobilize|immobilizing}} or {{tip|polymorph|polymorphing}} crowd control, excluding {{tip|sleep}}{{bug}}, during Battle Dance.''
wiki_detail.description4: ''If {{ci|Xayah}} is the target, Battle Dance can be cast from an increased range.''
wiki_detail.notes:
*Both casts count as ability activations for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}} and triggering {{ais|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} passive.
* The shields do not stack if ''Battle Dance'' is cast on the same target twice. Only the duration and shield amount is refreshed.

R.name: The Quickness
R.description: Gains Move Speed, charming and dealing magic damage to enemies touched.
R.tooltip: Rakan gains {{ e5 }}% Move Speed for {{ e2 }} seconds. Rakan deals {{ totaldamagetooltip }} magic damage and Charms enemies for {{ e3 }} second(s) the first time he touches them. The first champion touched grants Rakan {{ e6 }}% decaying Move Speed.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Rakan}} breaks into a captivating sprint, {{tip|ghosted|ghosting}} and gaining {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for a few seconds. '''Rakan''' deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies he touches, briefly {{tip|charm|charming}} and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Unique enemy {{tip|champion}} collisions slightly extend ''The Quickness' ''duration. The first enemy {{tip|champion|champion}} '''Rakan''' touches also grants him a burst of {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rakan''' breaks into a captivating sprint for 4 seconds, gaining {{tip|ghosting}} and {{sti|ms|{{as|75% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for the duration. During this time, he deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies he collides with and {{tip|charm|charms}} and {{tip|slow|slows}} them by 75% for a duration. This cannot affect the same enemy more than once.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|100 to 300}} {{as|(+ 50% AP)}}}}
{{st|Disable Duration|{{ap|1 to 1.5}} seconds}}
wiki_detail.description2: Colliding with an enemy {{tip|champion}} extends ''The Quickness' ''duration by {{fd|0.25}} seconds, which can occur once per champion. When '''Rakan''' collides with his first enemy champion, he gains an additional {{as|75% '''bonus''' movement speed}} that decays after {{fd|0.5}} seconds by 20% every {{fd|0.5}} seconds, then by 15% after decaying by 60% over {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description4: ''During The Quickness, '''Rakan''' cannot basic attack enemy champions he did not collide with, unless the attack command was inputted before the ability was activated.''
